capabilities.title: Branded Correspondence
capabilities.description: Send professional branded reply emails directly from the dashboard with configurable sections, presets, and live preview.

capabilities.title: Team Assignment
capabilities.description: Assign requests to team members, track who is handling what, and see unassigned requests at a glance.

capabilities.title: Status Pipeline
capabilities.description: Track requests through their lifecycle: New, Acknowledged, In Progress, Quoted, Completed, and Closed.

capabilities.title: Priority Management
capabilities.description: Flag urgent and high-priority requests with SLA tracking. Filter and sort by priority across the dashboard.

capabilities.title: Bulk Operations
capabilities.description: Select multiple requests and update status, assign team members, or archive in batch.

capabilities.title: Dev Mode Testing
capabilities.description: Redirect all outbound emails to a test address for safe testing with real data. Toggle on/off with a single switch.
